title: QuestCraft Essentials
description: QuestCraft Essentials is a lightweight Minecraft 1.21.5 modpack designed to improve VR performance on the Meta Quest 3/3s/2.
body:
# Enhancing Your QuestCraft Experience with QuestCraft
QuestCraft Essentials is an optimization modpack for Questcraft VR.

## Why Download QuestCraft ModPack?
This modpack is perfect for anyone looking to improve their VR gaming experience. Whether you're seeking better performance or just a few extra features to enhance your gameplay, this modpack has got you covered.



## Server Hosting (ad) 
You are looking for an easy way to play with your friends?
Get a powerful server and support us ❤ by clicking on the sign below!
